messages.author: ChiggerPepi
messages.text: Hawaii Meshcore is very quiet both on the airwaves and in here. I have a starter solar repeater set up in Waikoloa Village on Big Island, and I heard another repeater out in Puna last week. I know the other flavor of mesh is thriving. Anyone else want to join in on the dark side?
messages.content_html: Hawaii Meshcore is very quiet both on the airwaves and in here. I have a starter solar repeater set up in Waikoloa Village on Big Island, and I heard another repeater out in Puna last week. I know the other flavor of mesh is thriving. Anyone else want to join in on the dark side?

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
